sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports pain in the right knee, with swelling and reports pain in the left hand. The patient reports pain. The patient reports swelling.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: The doctor hears a grade 2 out of 6 systolic ejection murmur. The patient's blood pressure was 150 over 70. The patient reports pain in the knee.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient has a medial collateral ligament strain. The patient has hypertension.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: The doctor instructed the patient to ice the knee. The doctor ordered a referral to nutrition. The doctor ordered a knee brace. The doctor recommends elevating the leg. The nurse will be in with the orders. The doctor wants to continue the patient on lisinopril. The doctor prescribed ibuprofen.
